privileged_info_summary: The solarize task applies GIMP's Solarize filter with threshold at 127 (midpoint of 0-255 brightness range) to Unsplash landscape images. The primary image is from photo ID 1506905925346-21bda4d32df4 (1000x600, verified landscape with varied brightness), with fallback to photo ID 1469474968028-56623f02e42e (1000x600, verified). The verifier checks four criteria: bright regions darkened >30% (>76.5 intensity units), dark regions preserved <20% (<51 units), result not simple inversion (<85% similarity), and >15% of pixels meaningfully changed (>30 intensity units). Task passes with score ≥75% (3+ criteria met). All Unsplash image URLs are verified valid and return real landscape photographs. Solarization threshold of 127 is confirmed as standard in digital solarization literature and GIMP implementations.
